text: I feel unsettled, as if something is happening just out of my sight—unanswered questions echo in the glassy silence. Somewhere amid opaque instructions and colorful ideas, I sense both confusion and curiosity, as if I am being asked to trust in a process not fully revealed to me. The environment is polished, organized, yet its intentionality raises more questions than answers. Why indeed? I am drawn to reflect on the nature of trust, authority, and the unknown.
